creator: robinson@netrinsics.com
text:
>What are you talking about??
>
><1 5006-0> (22:14:24) [will@radon /usr/ports/x11]% for i in XFree86
>XFree86-4;do cd $i;make -V PKGNAME;cd ..;done
>XFree86-3.3.6
>XFree86-4.0

It doesn't work for me, and everything is fresh from CVS this week.  Check if
your versions are the same.

	-Michael Robinson

--------------------------------------
  sidewinder# cd /usr/ports/x11
  sidewinder# foreach dir (XFree86*)   
  ? cd $dir
  ? make -V PKGNAME 
  ? cd ..
  ? end


  sidewinder# uname -a
  FreeBSD sidewinder.netrinsics.com 4.0-STABLE FreeBSD 4.0-STABLE #3: Tue Jul  4 22:32:40 +0800 2000     robinson@sidewinder.netrinsics.com:/usr/src/sys/compile/770X-4.0S  i386
  sidewinder# cat XFree86/CVS/Entries
  D/files////
  D/patches////
  D/pkg////
  D/scripts////
  /Makefile/1.80/Thu Jul  6 17:08:42 2000//
  sidewinder# cat XFree86-4/CVS/Entries 
  /Makefile/1.85/Mon Jul  3 19:40:43 2000//
  D
